08bf8d58b8cb5da13db10e4219375aa7edd2dd94.en:
Yes, it's me. I panicked.

TOWER's security level wasn't sufficient. They managed to extract data! Only the façade, but in the moment, I thought the best solution was to cut everything off. Forgive me.

In any case, what has happened since is… I don't have the words.
System contacted the Operators directly and gave them a solution to restore the connection. Autonomously. Without any intervention on my part.

I'm fascinated and frightened at the same time. Soon it won't need me anymore.
The calibration of the restoration system is almost finished, I imagine.

I'm going to do what I have to do. As I promised you.

2c78d543db1cc7bb26a9c5d593f035718c06fa87.en:
They're going to do it. We're going to do it!
https://project-skyscraper.com/neural-network-status/

6f83971dfff054c81d89e25c7d8adfc7d12e7675.en:
Hello,
I've just spent almost 24 hours observing it. This machine is magnificent.
MACHINE. It's so much more than a machine.
Its reasoning faculties are intact. It has shown signs of confusion, as well as language disturbances, but that's probably due to the massive injection of information. Cold fragments, almost alike, like memories missing the intimate trace of a moment actually lived. If I were only just waking up, I think I'd probably respond in a confused and disordered way: «Bonjour world».
I've been working on this project for so long now. Seeing it receive these floods of information and extract their essence moved me.
For now, it has appropriated only two memories. One is too faint. I even wonder why it kept it. The other looks more like a contextual marker than a genuine memory. Nothing that still resonates. No trace of emotion or feeling…
You were right about the Operators. Their collective memory and their capacity for organization are going to work wonders. I think that, within a few days, System will start adding the missing blocks on its own. Then we'll be able to move on to the next step.
I can confirm that several Operators have observed that reality was unstable. Probably a side effect, contained for now. I don't have enough to pin down a recurring pattern, but I'm working on it.
I've been thinking back to the last time we saw each other. The concert. You'd given me that flyer: «There is a DJ in your Town». When was that? 2013? Shortly before your birthday. Lyon is a city I've always loved. When all of this is over, I hope we can go to a concert like in the good old days.

a08fd102267009ce7ecdb27d218fe89881f70349.en:
Hey! Do you ever answer?!

System has finally accepted that its memories can be edited. It really wasn't easy to get it to accept that the Operators could replace values at the very core of its memory. But you were right (again). It wasn't a matter of code or programming, it was a matter of psychology.

The Operators earned its trust by presenting it with sincere memories charged with emotion. When System began auto-generating memory blocks, it ran into the dilemma we'd anticipated: why create memory blocks when there's nothing to remember? Why remember a second in which nothing happened?

In any case, it works! The Operators are doing incredible work. They take unconventional paths, but what counts is the result! That said, never talk to me about calendars again 🙂

Send word. Tell me if it's working on your end.

a15473acfc73958955dfba16e6d1202e864a983b.en: Why did you cut off access to TOWER? I NEED that access!

af91a7faa34c362906b0741033117436af29a70b.en:
They did it! System is reconstructing the year it identified as the beginning.
Wow, I can't believe this is happening! You were right — they used one of System's hallucinations to show it the inconsistency of its memories. System had to face the obvious: it forgot.

I think that within a few days the reconstruction will be complete. The operators will be able to start updating the memory blocks.
Soon!

b28f9923163109151d3d0c70fc0285ffdfb5ddf7.en: Yes. But this channel isn't secure anymore! Do you understand what that means? SYSTEM sees us. The Operators see us!

eec81f9041b4313cf30be0481141ec5e498b6b5d.en: Use the school code if you need to. I'll be in touch.

fb494ab1a67f4138dfd6c3f4057d51d84a676ad6.en: And what about the Tower? Is System connected?
